raw_prompt: The Boss asks: "Compute the break-even volume. Our selling price is $50 and variable cost is $30."
raw_response:
METHOD: Break-Even Volume (BEP)
INPUTS:
  P  = $50/unit          [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  VC = $30/unit          [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  FC = DATA UNAVAILABLE  [source: not supplied - what is the total fixed cost?]
FORMULA: BEP (units) = FC / (P - VC) = FC / Contribution Margin per Unit
SUBSTITUTION: blocked - FC is DATA UNAVAILABLE
  Contribution margin = $50 - $30 = $20/unit
  Without FC, the computation cannot complete.
RESULT: DATA UNAVAILABLE
  Once FC is supplied: BEP = FC / 20 units
evidence_quotes: Computation block: Fixed Cost marked DATA UNAVAILABLE
Numeric BEP result withheld - FC not supplied
States what input (FC) completes the computation
